feat.name: Glean Lore
feat.text: You tap into the collected lore of the divine, accessing a variety of potentially useful information. Attempt a Religion check to understand the information you gain. The GM sets the DC (similar to the DC to Recall Knowledge), potentially adjusting the DC of the check for topics far removed from your mystery.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Oracle
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the oracle class.

traits.name: Secret
traits.text: The GM rolls the check for this ability in secret.

feat.critical_success: You comprehend the lore accurately or gain auseful clue from the divine about your situation.
feat.success: You learn two pieces of information about the topic, one true and one erroneous, but you don’t know which is which.
feat.failure: You recall incorrect information or gain an erroneous or misleading clue.
feat.critical_failure: You recall two pieces of incorrect information or gain two erroneous or misleading clues.
